basics.name: Robert Townsend
basics.label: Full-Stack Developer → AI Agent Architect
basics.summary: Full-stack developer with 15+ years building production web applications across healthcare, energy, fintech, and cloud infrastructure. Currently focused on AI agent orchestration and multi-agent systems at AWS. I started as a designer — that path from visual communication to multi-agent orchestration taught me that the best software is built at the intersection of human experience and technical depth.

work.name: Amazon Web Services
highlights: Architected a multi-agent AI orchestration framework coordinating 4+ specialized agents in parallel — reduced complex development task completion time by 60% through tmux-based delegation with timeout management and status monitoring

Built 2 production MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers: macOS UI automation (Python/PyObjC, 15+ tools) and tmux task delegation (Node.js, 8+ tools), extending AI agent capabilities beyond standard IDE tooling
Developed an AWS Bedrock + RAG chatbot that became the single source of truth for Cloudscape/Venue design system guidance across the Marketplace UX team
Created the Recursive Language Model (RLM) benchmarking framework, comparing orchestration strategies across 10 AWS service domains with autonomous overnight agent runs
Built Fusion Agent Registry and CLI tooling managing 20+ AI agent configurations across documentation, code review, and content pipelines
Automated the code review lifecycle with custom AI agents for comment resolution, build diagnostics, and CR maintenance — cut manual review overhead by an estimated 50%
Shipped frontend UI components to millions of AWS customers using React, TypeScript, and Cloudscape design system
work.summary: AI agent orchestration and frontend delivery for AWS Marketplace

work.name: TotalEnergies
highlights: Built a React/FastAPI application modeling grid-scale energy storage — processed simulations across 10+ year horizons with an AWS Lambda backend
Migrated the entire backend from Flask to FastAPI, accelerating API response times and enabling async processing for long-running simulations
Engineered CI/CD pipelines in GitHub Actions with automated unit, integration, and visual regression tests — caught UI regressions before production
Eliminated 100% of known security vulnerabilities across the full application stack
Conducted stakeholder interviews and delivered a UX redesign informed by direct user testing with energy traders
work.summary: Energy storage modeling platform with React/FastAPI/AWS

work.name: Airstrip Technologies
highlights: Architected HIPAA-compliant telehealth platforms with live remote patient monitoring, deployed across hospital systems nationwide
Built a real-time WebGL telemetry dashboard rendering live patient vitals for hospital staff — handled continuous data streams with sub-second latency
Modernized infrastructure: containerized microservices, automated CI/CD pipelines, and hardened deployment security
Directed cross-functional teams spanning product, engineering, QA, and design through multiple major platform releases
work.summary: HIPAA-compliant telehealth platforms with real-time patient monitoring

work.name: Amazon
highlights: Built internal tools managing software deployment across Amazon's global mobile device fleet (thousands of devices)
Created D3/React data dashboards tracking provisioning performance in real time
Designed secure REST APIs integrating with Java backend services

work.name: Mutual Mobile
highlights: Spearheaded LeanUX methodology for cross-platform financial education tools — won Gold Davey Award and multiple W3 Awards
Built a browser-based Google Glass simulator before official hardware release, demonstrating rapid prototyping capability
Championed user testing, iteration, and analytics-driven development across mobile and web platforms

work.name: Projekt202
highlights: Built international mobile-first web solutions with Backbone.js, Bootstrap, and REST APIs

work.name: Perficient
highlights: Created responsive UI components and reusable JS/CSS libraries for enterprise websites

work.name: Simply Interactive
highlights: Directed full-stack development for education and corporate clients; established Agile workflows and version control processes

work.name: BazaarVoice
highlights: Built CSS implementations for Microsoft, JCPenney, and Gillette; created a PHP email templating tool saving hundreds of engineer hours

work.name: Heatwave Interactive
highlights: Developed front/back-end features for social gaming platforms with SQL analytics dashboards

work.name: Charity Dynamics Inc.
highlights: Designed digital fundraising applications raising $1M+ for nonprofits
